commit.message:
Add README with architecture overview, setup, and API docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add meiosis gene expression analysis in early embryo

Analyze Stra8, Dazl, Sycp1-3, Spo11, Dmc1, Rad51, Rec8, Smc1b, Stag3,
Hormad1/2, Prdm9 across preimplantation stages. Classify genes into:
- Maternal clearance (Dazl): high in MII, degraded by 2-cell
- ZGA reactivation (Sycp1, Hormad1, Prdm9): low in MII, upregulated at 2-cell
- Stable low (Stra8, Spo11, Rec8): not expressed in early embryo
- Stable/moderate (Sycp3, Rad51, etc.): possible non-meiotic functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add combine orders feature for Printify orders on hold

New feature to combine multiple orders from the same customer when
they order multiple times in a short period and orders are on hold.

Changes:
- New "Orders On Hold" page at /admin/orders-on-hold
- Shows all Printify orders currently on hold
- Highlights customers with multiple orders (combine candidates)
- Combine orders modal with search functionality
- Search by order number or customer name
- Validates shipping addresses match before combining
- Validates orders are not in production
- Creates new combined order with items from both orders
- Uses the first order's name/label for the combined order
- Cancels original orders in Printify (not Shopify)
- Releases hold on the new combined order
- Sends customer shipping notification

API endpoints:
- GET /api/admin/printify/orders-on-hold - List orders on hold
- GET /api/admin/printify/combine-orders?q=... - Search orders
- POST /api/admin/printify/combine-orders - Combine two orders

PrintifyClient additions:
- sendToProduction() - Release order hold
- createOrderWithPrintDetails() - Create order with full details
- canCancelOrder() - Check if order can be cancelled

fix: truncate structured data fields to column limits in end-of-call-report

Vapi's GPT-4o analysis can return values longer than the DB column limits
for caller_sentiment (VARCHAR 20), success_evaluation (VARCHAR 20), and
caller_intent (VARCHAR 50), causing StringDataRightTruncationError and
failing to save end-of-call-report data.

Added [:50], [:20], [:20] truncation guards on the three affected fields.

that don't support imagesrcset.

Add _site/, backups/, docs/ to .gitignore

Co-Authored-By: umang vanjara <umang@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add per-call timeout override to MCP bridge, 5min for Dream State

The MCP bridge had a hard 30-second timeout on ALL tool calls including
Dream State, which needs minutes for event collection + LLM assessment.
The 30s timer would fire mid-execution, causing the gRPC event stream
to be cancelled — surfacing as DEADLINE_EXCEEDED with 0 events.

- Added optional timeoutMs parameter to Transport.call, McpTransport,
  HttpTransport, and McpBridge.callTool/sendRequest
- Dream State uses 5-minute timeout instead of default 30s

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix 5 code review findings: ErrorBoundary, nav, sanitize, honeypot, coupling (#19)

- ErrorBoundary: replace "Try again" (caused infinite re-render loop) with
  "Reload page" using window.location.reload(). Add componentDidCatch for
  error logging.
- Add Volunteer section to Header nav and Footer quick links — was
  unreachable despite having id="volunteer"
- sanitize(): remove HTML entity encoding (wrong for KV/email storage),
  keep control char stripping + trim + length limit
- Add honeypot field to contact form — hidden input that bots fill but
  humans don't. Worker silently accepts and discards bot submissions.
- Replace requestResource() DOM manipulation with URL hash params.
  Contact reads #contact?subject=...&message=... on mount via refs
  instead of cross-component getElementById coupling.

Co-authored-by: Ryan Gray <ryag@microsoft.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update docs for HTTPS external access and access tag changes

- trailhead.md: External domain now https://home.1701.me with SSL, updated proxy host IDs
- trailhead-permissions.md: Updated access groups to per-card tags, Authentik to HTTPS
- local-home-domains.md: Added SSL certificates section for home.1701.me and auth.1701.me

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add: highlight planned route on map

When a route is calculated, the matching canal/river segments are
highlighted on the map with a pulsing gold glow + bright line overlay,
while all other waterways fade to near-invisible. Map auto-fits to
the highlighted extent. Toggle and Clear buttons let you show/hide
the highlight without recalculating.

- ROUTE_TO_WATERWAYS: maps all 52 route numbers to GeoJSON waterway names
- highlightRouteOnMap(): dims waterway layer, adds glow+line layerGroup
- restoreWaterwayStyles(): restores per-waterway colours on clear
- @keyframes routePulse: subtle breathing animation on highlight paths
- Auto-highlights on Calculate; cleared when panel is closed

commit.message:
feat(checkout): mobile payment, image optimization, order items fix, Apple Cash removal

- Add PaymentMethodSelector directly in mobile sticky footer so
  mobile users can select Venmo/PayPal.me (was showing unreachable
  "Select a payment method above" message)
- Optimize product images from PNG (5-6MB each) to JPG (160-200KB)
  and blog images from JPEG (3MB) to JPG (130-170KB) to fix Vercel
  "Request body too large" deploy error (130MB -> 7MB)
- Restore hero/logo images to original quality JPEGs
- Fix order_items not saving: checkout was sending static catalog ID
  ("prod-1") as product_id but DB column has UUID FK constraint;
  now sends productSlug and API resolves to DB UUID before insert
- Fix order detail page not showing items: API now maps DB UUIDs
  back to slugs for static product catalog image lookup
- Remove Apple Cash payment method entirely (8 files): type, selector,
  component, API schema, email template, admin form, payment index
- Update Venmo username from @DYORWellness to @shaun-kimball
- Remove "Total Spent" stat from account page
- Add .vercelignore to exclude .claude/ and root supabase/ from deploy
- Remove .vercel from parent ~/projects dir (was deploying wrong folder)
- Bump version to 0.4.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Stabilization pass: security fixes, bug fixes, performance & polish

Security: sanitize filenames client-side, reduce multipart memory limit,
check rand.Read errors, switch client secret hashing to bcrypt (with
SHA-256 fallback for migration), only trust X-Forwarded-For behind proxy.

Bugs: check io.Copy errors, propagate loadManifest R2 errors, fix SSE
reconnect leak on component destroy, replace non-null assertions with
guards, parallelize owned-sites fetch, reorder DB-then-manifest writes.

Performance: add indexes on memberships(user_id) and forums(owner_id),
rewrite LRU cache with container/list for O(1) touch, make DB pool
MaxConns configurable via DB_MAX_CONNS env var.

Polish: log auth callback errors, disable upload button during upload,
include server response detail in error toasts, remove legacy
localStorage cleanup, add context cancellation to rate limiter goroutine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Computerized Adaptive Testing (GRM) for Heavy tier

Implements Graded Response Model engine for polytomous (Likert) items
with EAP theta estimation via Gauss-Hermite quadrature. Per-facet
adaptive testing with SE-based stopping (target SE < 0.30, min 3,
max 10 items per facet).

New components:
- grm-engine.ts: Core IRT math (GRM probabilities, Fisher information,
  theta estimation, normal CDF percentile conversion)
- cat-controller.ts: Session management, item selection, stopping rules,
  fixed-form prior integration
- AdaptiveTestRunner: Dynamic item selection UI with SE convergence bars
- Synthetic item banks: Big Five (450 items) and HEXACO (360 items)
  with literature-typical GRM parameters for development
- R script for SAPA parameter extraction (production use)

Analysis pipeline updated with CAT score extraction (theta->percentile
conversion, reliability-weighted merge, SE-gated domain overrides).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v11.8: Fix MG spell graying — #pragma pack on packet structs

PRECEIVE_CHARACTER_LIST_EXTENDED lacked #pragma pack(push,1), causing
WORD Level to be read from offset 12 instead of 11 (1 byte padding after
char ID[10]). All characters got Level=0, graying every skill with a
level requirement in Skill.bmd.

Also fixed: PRECEIVE_GUILD_LISTS, PPRECEIVE_GUILDINFO,
PMSG_UNION_VIEWPORT_NOTIFY, PRECEIVE_SERVER_ADDRESS, PMSG_ANS_NPC_CLICK.

commit.message:
Master latency optimization: dispatch tool, brevity rules, device health feedback

- Replace 4 send_to_* tools with single dispatch tool (shared context + per-device instructions)
- Rewrite SOUL.md tool-use rules to enforce concise instructions (no narrative, no metaphors)
- Add instruction examples (good/bad) to SOUL.md
- Remove device SOUL.md files from master prompt assembly (~3000 fewer input tokens)
- Remove dead rover waypoint/target code (rover has no position tracking)
- Lower max_tokens from 4096 to 1500
- Add device health tracking: action results persist to state.json, surfaced in master prompt
- Master skips offline/errored devices automatically (SOUL.md rule 9)
- Dispatch failures (offline) also update device health

Results: ~50% latency reduction (9s avg → 4-6s), ~50% fewer output tokens (322 avg → 150-200)

commit.message:
Validate AI safe-point choice against road reachability

Before accepting the AI decision, run checkSafePointFeasibility to
verify the chosen safe point is actually reachable given current
blocked edges. If it is blocked:
- Override with the nearest reachable safe point so the guide moves
- Force thread recycling so the AI gets fresh context next tick
  (clears accumulated history bias toward the blocked safe point)

GPU path is needed.
